category_sources: Official manpage says mp3unicode converts ID3 tags in MP3 files between encodings: https://mp3unicode.sourceforge.net/manpage.html
source_facts.description: Command-line utility to convert mp3 tags between different encodings
docs_sources: Official SourceForge site and downloads page link the Git repository: https://mp3unicode.sourceforge.net/downloads.html
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/alonbl/mp3unicode; per instruction, repo was not re-evaluated
tags_sources: Official manpage describes converting ID3 tags between encodings: https://mp3unicode.sourceforge.net/manpage.html
source_facts.description identifies MP3 tag encoding conversion
